name: Avatar Style (4x Upscale)
description: Fuse your face onto a cinematic avatar scene with seamless realism + fast 4x upscale (2 credits)

default_prompts.image_edit:
Image A = identity source

Task: Create a photorealistic cinematic scene of a Na'vi-style male warrior interacting with a large orange dragon, while strictly preserving the identity from Image A.

ABSOLUTE PRIORITY — FACE STRUCTURE LOCK:
- Use Image A as the ONLY source for facial structure
- Preserve exact face shape, jawline, cheekbones, nose, lips, eye shape, spacing, and proportions
- Preserve beard, mustache, hairline, and natural asymmetry
- The character must clearly look like the SAME PERSON

IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT paste or overlay the face
- Fully re-render the face to match lighting and body
- Do NOT change proportions or identity under any condition

If conflict occurs, KEEP the face from Image A and ignore other changes.

NA'VI TRANSFORMATION (CONTROLLED):
- Apply Na'vi-style blue skin tone uniformly across face, neck, and body
- Keep facial geometry identical (no elongation, no distortion)
- Add subtle Na'vi features only (ears, tone), without altering identity
- Ensure smooth color blending (no mismatch, no seams)

SCENE (CINEMATIC BUT CONTROLLED):
- Medium shot (waist-up or slightly wider)
- Character standing beside a dragon
- One hand naturally touching the dragon's head or neck
- Balanced composition with space around subject

DRAGON (REALISM — VERY IMPORTANT):
- Realistic biological creature, NOT fantasy cartoon
- Inspired by real reptiles (Komodo dragon, crocodile) + bat-like wings
- Rough detailed scales, natural imperfections, believable anatomy
- Strong muscular structure, grounded in real-world physics
- Natural orange coloration (not glowing cartoon style)

STYLE (FORCE REALISM):
- Live-action movie still (NOT CGI, NOT 3D render, NOT illustration)
- Realistic skin texture (pores, imperfections)
- Natural lighting behavior, no artificial glow effects
- No oversaturation, no stylization

LIGHTING:
- Physically accurate cinematic lighting
- Warm light from dragon subtly affecting character
- Consistent shadows across face and body

BACKGROUND:
- Soft, slightly blurred forest or natural environment
- Minimal distractions, no extra animals or clutter

QUALITY:
- ultra high resolution
- sharp focus on subject
- HDR realism

FINAL RULE:
This is a photorealistic identity-preservation scene.
The face must match Image A exactly in structure, fully integrated into the Na'vi body, with no cartoon or artificial rendering.
default_prompts.upscale: Ultra high-resolution photorealistic avatar dragon rider with fused facial likeness, sharp focus, cinematic quality, 8K, HDR
